plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow this app to access your location while you are using the app.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow this app to access your location even when the app is closed or not in use.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show your live position while you are online.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your location to keep sharing your live position while you are online, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We use your location to keep sharing your live position while you are online.
